## Reviewer Checklist

- [ ] Acceptance criteria fully satisfied
- [ ] Scope is bounded and no unrelated changes
- [ ] Tests credibly cover changed behavior
- [ ] Risk and rollback notes are adequate
- [ ] Documentation/config updates are included when required
- [ ] Required checks are green
- [ ] Required approvals/CODEOWNERS requirements are satisfied
